positive: A minimalist, highly stylized illustration of a celestial forest scene. The main subject is a winding path leading through giant, glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and crystalline flora. The style should be a blend of neo-Art Nouveau and modern vector graphics, emphasizing clean, bold lines and elegant symmetry. Composition should be centralized, drawing the eye down the path. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, ethereal teal, brilliant cyan, and accents of glowing gold. The atmosphere is mystical and serene. Focus on strong silhouettes and flat areas of color that print well on fabric. Highly detailed, UHD, concept art, graphic novel style, perfect for apparel print.
negative: blurry, low quality, watermark, signature, text, noisy, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, logos, trademarks, characters, copyrighted, dirty, grain
